languages.text: {n}Глейто испускает низкий угрожающий рык. Соломон поднимает руку в предупреждающем жесте. {/n} "Внутри опасность, Вольный Торговец. Тип угрозы: неизвестен, авгурация не дает результатов. Последствия входа — на ваш страх и риск".

{n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Rogue Trader. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."
languages.original_text: {n}Глейто испускает низкий угрожающий рык. Соломон поднимает руку в предупреждающем жесте. {/n} "Внутри опасность, Вольный Торговец. Тип угрозы: неизвестен, авгурация не дает результатов. Последствия входа — на ваш страх и риск".

traits.locale_text: {n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Lord Captain. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."

{n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Lord Captain. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."

{n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Lord Captain. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."

languages.text: {n}グライトの口から低い威嚇の唸り声が漏れた。ソロモーンは警告のジェスチャーで手を挙げた。{/n}「危険が内側にあります、隊長様。脅威の種類は不明、予知の調査は不確実です。侵入の危険はご自身の責任となります」
languages.original_text: {n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Lord Captain. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."

traits.locale_text: グレイトの口から低い威嚇の唸り声が漏れた。ソロモーンは警告のジェスチャーで手を挙げた。「危険が内側にあります、隊長様。脅威の種類は不明、予知の調査は不確実です。侵入の危険はご自身の責任となります。」

languages.text: {n}格雷托的喉咙里滚出一阵威胁的低吼。索罗蒙抬手示警。{/n}“行商浪人，里面有危险。威胁类型：未知，俄歇矩阵扫描结果不明确。若您有意强行进入，后果自负。”
languages.original_text: {n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Rogue Trader. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."

traits.locale_text: {n}格雷托的喉咙里滚出一阵威胁的低吼。索罗蒙抬手示警。{/n}“行商浪人，里面有危险。威胁类型：未知，俄歇矩阵扫描结果不明确。若您有意强行进入，后果自负。”

languages.text: {n}Un gruñido grave y amenazador surge del bozal de Glaito. Solomorne levanta la mano en señal de advertencia. {/n} «Es peligroso ahí dentro, Comerciante Independiente. Tipo de amenaza: desconocido; el escáner del augur no es concluyente. Si entra, será bajo su cuenta y riesgo».
languages.original_text: {n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Rogue Trader. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un gruñido grave y amenazador surge del bozal de Glaito. Solomorne levanta la mano en señal de advertencia. {/n} «Es peligroso ahí dentro, Comerciante Independiente. Tipo de amenaza: desconocido; el escáner del augur no es concluyente. Si entra, será bajo su cuenta y riesgo».

languages.text: {n}Glaito stößt ein tiefes, bedrohliches Knurren aus. Solomorne hebt warnend seine Hand. {/n} "Gefahr im Verzug, Lord Captain. Art der Bedrohung: Unbekannt. Auguren-Scan ist nicht eindeutig. Betreten auf eigene Gefahr."
languages.original_text: {n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Rogue Trader. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."

traits.locale_text: {n}Glaito stößt ein tiefes, bedrohliches Knurren aus. Solomorne hebt warnend seine Hand. {/n} "Gefahr im Verzug, Lord Captain. Art der Bedrohung: Unbekannt. Auguren-Scan ist nicht eindeutig. Betreten auf eigene Gefahr."

languages.text: {n}Un grondement menaçant s'échappe de la gueule de Glaito. Solomorne lève la main pour vous avertir.{/n} « Il y a quelque chose de dangereux à l'intérieur, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Type de menace : inconnu, l'analyse de l'augure n'a rien donné. Entrez à vos risques et périls. »
languages.original_text: {n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Rogue Trader. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un grondement menaçant s'échappe de la gueule de Glaito. Solomorne lève la main pour vous avertir. {/n}« Il y a quelque chose de dangereux à l'intérieur, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Type de menace : inconnu, l'analyse de l'augure n'a rien donné. Entrez à vos risques et périls. »

languages.text: {n}Glaito'nun ağzından alçak, tehditkâr bir hırlama dökülüyor. Solomorne, uyarıcı bir jestle elini kaldırıyor.{/n} "İçeride tehlike var Hür Tacir. Tehdit türü: Bilinmiyor, alamet taraması sonuçsuz. Girişin sonuçları kendi sorumluluğunuzdadır."
languages.original_text: {n}A low, threatening growl rolls out of Glaito's muzzle. Solomorne raises his hand in a warning gesture. {/n} "There is danger inside, Rogue Trader. Type of threat: unknown, the augur scan is inconclusive. Consequences of entry are at your own risk."

traits.locale_text: {n}Glaito'nun ağzından alçak, tehditkâr bir hırlama dökülüyor. Solomorne, uyarıcı bir jestle elini kaldırıyor.{/n} "İçeride tehlike var Hür Tacir. Tehdit türü: Bilinmiyor, alamet taraması sonuçsuz. Girişin sonuçları kendi sorumluluğunuzdadır."
